source.title: 2026 salary schedule (Town Board agenda packet, Jan 6, 2026)

note: Board-authorized annual base salaries for 2026, from the January 6, 2026 agenda packet. This is authorized pay, not actual pay. Sewer/Scavenger and purely seasonal/hourly staff are not included.
